name: John Reeves Waste Management
location: Bithums Farm, New Inn Bank, Bishops Offley, Stafford, Staffordshire, ST21 6HD
hours: Call for septic tank emptying and drainage support
about: John Reeves Waste Management is a family-run licensed waste carrier with decades of experience in septic tank emptying, sewage treatment plant emptying and drain cleaning. The demo keeps the personality but replaces the old layout with a strong service and enquiry structure.
